# Critical Contour Task Note Block

Use this block only when the task hits a configured critical contour.

```md
## Critical Contour Control
- Solution Class: target|staged|fallback
- Critical Contour: data-integration-closure|runtime-publication-closure
- Forbidden Shortcuts: synthetic-upstream-boundary, scaffold-only-closure, undeclared-runtime-substitution, hidden-fallback-path, sample-evidence-instead-of-contour-evidence
- Closure Evidence: <exact contour evidence that proves the claimed closure>
- Shortcut Waiver: none|<one-line reason>

## Design Checkpoint
- Chosen Path: <what path is being taken now>
- Why Not Shortcut: <why this is not fake or hidden closure>
- Future Shape Preserved: <what target shape remains intact>
```

For non-critical work, do not add this block unless the task later crosses into a configured critical contour.
